title: Frozen II Girls Canteen Water Bottle Anna Elsa Pop Up Lid with Shoulder Strap
description:
The Disney Frozen II girl’s canteen water bottle is an excellent option for children to bring their favorite drink with them to school or on trips to stay hydrated throughout the day! The officially licensed canteen features characters from the hit Disney movie franchise: Anna, Elsa, and Olaf! The bottle features an easy-to-use flip-top lid with a secure grip cap to keep the liquids contained, and comes with a built-in straw. The water bottle is made of safe, BPA-free plastic that is safe for children, and also has a shoulder strap. The girl’s water bottle holds up to 12 ounces of water or juice and can assist children in staying hydrated and aid in digestion in between meals. This is a wonderful gift idea for young children and Disney Frozen fans!
